channel.title: HiOS on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in HiOS on Tech Tracker

item.title: How to create custom DIY themes for HiOS based Tecno mobiles.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-rWaKbBRoM_E/YlxOdue-PvI/AAAAAAAAKSY/vb-W3TR1ejoLORIG9wd1f507W0YtGvLLQCNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1650216562460790-0.png" alt=""> HiOS is custom skin Android operating system like MIUI, FIUI, Oxygen OS, NubiaUI etc build for Tecno mobiles and like any other custom Android software, HiOS use custom launcher so you can apply custom themes to automatically change wallpaper, cover, app icons etc according to your liking for whole new experience. If you’re using stock Android operating system then very likely you won’t get custom launchers that support custom icons, but don’t worry we have numerous custom launchers out there on internet like Nova launcher which you can use to create and apply custom DIY themes without theme stores, isn’t this cool?

item.title: HiOS vs MIUI, which is best custom Android OS on smartphones?
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-wlOlGPRd_kQ/YkCjm0RoRQI/AAAAAAAAJ5Y/5l0_3lnoVyQCZUMSYHTpifK1vu0Q_e96wCNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1648403352332235-0.png" alt=""> Android is open source software from Google so anyone can develop his own version of Android OS, that’s why many smartphone companies and developers around the world build thier own custom skin version of Android to install on thier smartphones with additional changes in user interface and extra features. We have numerous custom Android OS softwares from smartphone companies and developers on XDA portal, however MIUI from Xiaomi Inc.

item.title: HiOS 7.6 - Incredible Features Coming Soon To Latest Tecno Mobile Phones!
item.description: **<img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-TSf_3hny87E/YLDRnYda7PI/AAAAAAAAEso/gFiQ1CvOJ8gePHN6zXtlthWSsDUyl8FGgCLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1622200725680788-0.png" alt="HiOS 7.6 - Incredible Features Coming Soon To Latest Tecno Mobile Phones!" title="HiOS 7.6 - Incredible Features Coming Soon To Latest Tecno Mobile Phones!"> ** ** Tecno mobile** is one of the leading phone company which provide quality phones at budget prices competing xiaomi, redmi & oneplus due to tecno mobiles quality and technology it has become new favourite to many users, tecno strives to provide best quality with perfect usage experience for their users with their top notch hardware and software included with warranty.
